channel.title: OMRON Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by OMRON Corporation (omron).

item.title: CVE-2026-5397 · 7.8 HIGH — Vulnerability Related to an Uncontrolled Search Path Element in a UPS Management Application
item.description: It has been identified that a vulnerability (CWE-427) exists in the UPS (Uninterruptible Power Supply) management application, whereby improper permissions on the installation directory allow a malicious actor to place a DLL that is then executed wit…

item.title: CVE-2025-9818 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Vulnerability caused by unquoted file paths of Windows services registered by the Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) management application
item.description: A vulnerability (CWE-428) has been identified in the Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) management application provided by OMRON SOCIAL SOLUTIONS Co., Ltd., where the executable file paths of Windows services are not enclosed in quotation marks. If t…

item.title: CVE-2025-1384 · 7 HIGH 🌩️ — Least Privilege Violation Vulnerability in the communications functions of NJ/NX-series Machine Automation Controllers
item.description: Least Privilege Violation (CWE-272) Vulnerability exists in the communication function between the NJ/NX-series Machine Automation Controllers and the Sysmac Studio Software. An attacker may use this vulnerability to perform unauthorized access and t…

item.title: CVE-2025-0591 · 7.8 HIGH — Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability in CX-Programmer
item.description: Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability (CWE-125) was found in CX-Programmer. Attackers may be able to read sensitive information or cause an application crash by abusing this vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2024-12083 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Path Traversal Vulnerabilities in NJ/NX-series Machine Automation Controllers
item.description: Path Traversal Vulnerabilities (CWE-22) exist in NJ/NX-series Machine Automation Controllers. An attacker may use these vulnerabilities to perform unauthorized access and to execute unauthorized code remotely to the controller products.

item.title: CVE-2024-12298 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Vulnerability Report on Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference in NB-Designer
item.description: We found a vulnerability Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference (CWE-611) in NB-series NX-Designer. Attackers may be able to abuse this vulnerability to disclose confidential data on a computer.
